pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_openproject.sh which creates user 'bob.smith' and task instructions.
Checked OpenProject source code (modules/grids/config/locales/js-en.yml) for widget identifiers.
Checked OpenProject source code (modules/grids/config/locales/js-en.yml). The exact UI title for the widget is 'My spent time', not 'Spent time'.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring the dashboard for the user 'bob.smith' with specific widgets. Analysis of OpenProject source code confirms the internal widget identifiers are 'work_packages_assigned' and 'time_entries_current_user'. The exact UI name for the time widget is 'My spent time', contradicting the metadata's claim of 'Spent time'.
